title: Review: JMAP correctness fixes (HEAD~5..HEAD)
notes:
Maintainer risk: MEDIUM — one genuine atomicity bug left open in contact_set (blocked+displayName type mismatch). space_set is clean. SQL duplication in update_space_fully is low-frequency risk.
Confidence: 88% chance of no missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: (1) did not run the test suite — tests look correct but could have subtle oracle issues; (2) contact_set atomicity for blocked+displayName type-error path is not tested and was not caught by the new tests. Would raise confidence if: test added for {blocked:true, displayName:42} to verify not_updated with no DB write.
